quote:
In the heat of battle, a single lantern can guide a lost spirit home.

When gunfire paints innocence crimson, thunder reminds the land to whisper about peace.

Artifacts of remembrance turn bruised earth into gardens of hope.

The winds of technology can whirl a world into new dreams, but truth must be a steady root.

A lone rat that finds a landmine’s hidden heart shows that even the meek may be guardians.

The moon’s eye reflects more than the earth, reminding us that distance cannot erase shared breath.

When the heart still seeks to write, the world listens with open ears.
quote_preview: In the heat of battle, a single lantern can guide a lost spirit home.
